zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich II von Sachsen於1310年11月30日出生在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔時，他的父親Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I53歲，母親Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk25歲。他於1328年5月28日與Mathilde von Bayern在德國貝也纽伦堡結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年11月18日在德國格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀瓦特包格享年38歲，埋葬在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich II von Sachsen于1310年11月30日出生在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 格塔时，他的父亲Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I53岁，母亲Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk25岁。他于1328年5月28日与Mathilde von Bayern在德国貝也纽伦堡结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年11月18日在德国格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 薩辛-維馬-森亞賀瓦特包格享年38岁，埋葬在德国薩辛可萊斯 梅斯諾森。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Rainer, Armin, Claus, Heinz, Hildegarde, Johannes, Kurt, Wolfgang.

variants.name: Sachs
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Lower Saxony (German Niedersachsen) in northern Germany. The region is named for the ancient Germanic tribe that settled there in Roman times, whose name derives from an ancient Germanic word (preserved in Old Saxon and Old High German), sahs ‘knife, sword’. The area in central Germany called Sachsen was named after the line of princes who owned title to the northern territories in 1422.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): surname adopted in memory of persecuted forebears, an acronym of the Hebrew phrase Zera Qodesh SHemo ‘his name is of the seed of holiness’. Compare Socks and Zacks .

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich II von Sachsen was born on 30 November 1310, in Gotha, Thuringia, Germany, his father, Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I, was 53 and his mother, Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk, was 25. He married Mathilde von Bayern on 28 May 1328, in Nuremberg, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 18 November 1349, in Wartburg, Saxe-Weimar-Eisenach, Germany, at the age of 38, and was buried in Nossen, Meißen, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich II von Sachsen est né le 30 novembre 1310, à Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde von Bayern le 28 mai 1328, à Nürnberg, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 novembre 1349, à Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Allemagne, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: Eisenach, Kreis Eisenacher, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich II von Sachsen am 30. November 1310 in Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I 53 und seine Mutter Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk 25. Er hat am 28. Mai 1328 in Nürnberg, Bayern, Deutschland Mathilde von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. November 1349 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Deutschland und wurde in Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich II von Sachsen è nato il il 30 novembre 1310 nel Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Germania, il suo padre, Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde von Bayern il 28 maggio 1328, nel Nürnberg, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 novembre 1349, nel Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Germania, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich II von Sachsenが1310年11月30日にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス ゴサで生まれた時，父Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen Iは53歳，母Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugkは25歳であった。1328年5月28日にドイツバイエルンンuルンバーグでMathilde von Bayernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年11月18日にドイツグロssハーゾグトゥム サチセン-ウエイマル-エイセナチワートブルグで38歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンクレイス メイssンノセンにて埋葬された。

ko.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 크레이스 아이센악헤르 아이센악h
ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich II von Sachsen(이)가 1310년 11월 30일 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 가스아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1328년 5월 28일 독일 베이른 뉘른베르크에서 Mathilde von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 11월 18일 독일 그로ss헤어즈그투 작센-위마-이센악h 워트버그에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss 노센에 묻혔다.

pt.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: Eisenach, Kreis Eisenacher, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich II von Sachsen nasceu em 30 de novembro de 1310, em Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde von Bayern em 28 de maio de 1328, em Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1349, em Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemanha, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: аисенач, крис аисеначир, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich II von Sachsen родился 30 ноября 1310 г. в местности ландкрис гота, тuринген, Германия, его отцу по имени Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde von Bayern 28 мая 1328 г. в местности Нюрнберг, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 18 ноября 1349 г. в местности вартбург, гроssхирзогтум сачсен-вимар-исенач, Германия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности носсен, крис миssен, сачсен, Германия.

es.30 November 1310–18 November 1349: 30 de noviembre de 1310–18 de noviembre de 1349
es.Eisenach, Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Thüri: Eisenach, Kreis Eisenacher, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich II von Sachsen nació el 30 de noviembre de 1310, en Landkreis Gotha, Thüringen, Alemania, su papá, Friedrich I Markgraf von Meissen, Landgraf von Thüringen von Meissen I, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Lobdeburg-Arnshaugk, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mathilde von Bayern el 28 de mayo de 1328, en Nürnberg, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1349, en Wartburg, Großherzogtum Sachsen-Weimar-Eisenach, Alemania, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Nossen, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Alemania.
